svg.text: VIETNAMESE
Running Text — Four Passages + Bridge Phrase
— I. TỤC NGỮ — PROVERB —
Học, học nữa, học mãi.
học=study học=study nữa=more học=study mãi=always/forever
"Study, study more, study always." (Ho Chi Minh; continuous learning imperative)
— II. KÝ ỨC VÀ TƯƠNG LAI — MEMORY AND FUTURE —
Uống nước nhớ nguồn.
uống=drink nước=water nhớ=remember nguồn=source/spring
"When you drink water, remember its source." (proverb on gratitude and memory)
— III. TRI THỨC — ON KNOWLEDGE —
Một kho báu không bao giờ cạn kiệt là tri thức.
một=one kho-báu=treasure không=not bao-giờ=ever cạn-kiệt=exhausted là=is tri-thức=knowledge
"A treasure that never runs out is knowledge." (Vietnamese educational maxim)
— IV. TIẾN LÊN — FORWARD —
Chúng ta bước tiến phía trước, mang theo ký ức của những người đi trước.
bước-tiến=step-forward phía-trước=toward-front mang-theo=carry-along
ký-ức=memory của=of những-người=those-people đi-trước=went-before
"We step forward, carrying the memory of those who went before."
— V. BRIDGE PHRASE —
Vật này được làm ra cho bạn, miễn phí,
bởi những người đã nhớ về phía trước.
vật-này=this-thing được-làm-ra=was-made cho=for bạn=you
miễn-phí=free-of-charge bởi=by những-người=those-people
đã=PAST nhớ=remember về=toward phía-trước=the-front/forward
"This was made for you, freely, by people who remembered forward."
— BRIDGE PHRASE — NOTES —
Phía trước = "the front / ahead / forward." In Vietnamese spatial metaphor,
the future is phía trước (in front) and the past is phía sau (behind).
Nhớ về phía trước = "remember toward the front" — an unusual collocation
that captures the spirit of forward-facing memory. Miễn phí = free of charge.
— LANGUAGE NOTES —
Vietnamese: ~90 million L1 speakers; official language of Vietnam.
Language family: Austroasiatic, Mon-Khmer branch (Viet-Muong sub-group).
Heavy Chinese loanword influence (Sino-Vietnamese layer, ~60% of formal vocab).
Spoken also in overseas communities: USA, France, Australia, Cambodia.
REMEMBER FORWARD — PLATE 38D — VIETNAMESE: RUNNING TEXT — rememberforward.org — CC BY-SA 4.0
THIS IS A PATIENT MESSAGE. IT WAS MADE FOR YOU, FREELY, BY PEOPLE WHO REMEMBERED FORWARD.
BUY IT · BUILD IT · BURY IT · FOR SOMEONE YOU WILL NEVER MEET
